EN.title: MY TYPICAL WEEK
EN.vocab:
Weekdays routine
Talk about a normal weekday from morning to night.
(What time you wake up, work/study, rest)
Weekend routine
Compare what you do on weekends vs weekdays.
Busy vs free days
Describe a busy day and a free day.
Say which one you prefer and why (simple reasons).
Study/work balance
Explain how you balance work/study and rest.
Changes in my week
Talk about changes in your routine recently.
Weekly summary story
Tell the story of one full week in your life.

EN.title: TIME MANAGEMENT
EN.vocab:
Morning time
Describe your morning routine and how you use time.
Busy hours
Talk about the busiest time of your day.
Being late / early
Share experiences of being late or early.
Planning the day
Explain how you plan your day (or don’t).
Time problems
Talk about problems with time (too busy, tired).
Better time habits
Explain one habit you want to improve.

EN.title: FOOD, HABITS & LIFESTYLE
EN.vocab:
Daily meals
Describe what you eat in a normal day.
Eating habits
Talk about eating times, snacks, drinks.
Cooking vs eating out
Compare eating at home and eating outside.
Healthy vs unhealthy
Give examples of healthy and unhealthy habits.
Food changes
Talk about changes in your eating habits.
Lifestyle reflection
Explain how food affects your daily life.

EN.title: PLACES I OFTEN GO
EN.vocab:
Work/study places
Describe places where you work or study.
Food & coffee places
Talk about cafes or restaurants you like.
Shopping places
Describe where you usually shop.
Relaxing places
Talk about places where you relax.
Why I like them
Explain why you like these places.
My daily map
Describe your daily movement between places.

EN.title: PEOPLE IN MY DAILY LIFE
EN.vocab:
People at work/school
Talk about people you meet every day.
Friends & classmates
Describe your friends or classmates.
Family contact
Explain how often you talk to family.
Neighbors
Talk about your neighbors or people nearby.
Communication style
Describe how you communicate with people.
People summary
Summarize who is important in your daily life.

EN.title: PAST EXPERIENCES
EN.vocab:
Good experience
Tell a positive experience from the past.
Bad experience
Describe a difficult or unpleasant experience.
First-time experience
Talk about doing something for the first time.
What I learned
Explain what you learned from that experience.
Feelings then & now
Compare how you felt then and now.
Experience story
Tell the full story clearly.

EN.title: TRAVEL & TRANSPORTATION
EN.vocab:
Daily commuting
Describe how you travel daily.
Transport problems
Talk about problems with transport.
Travel preferences
Explain how you prefer to travel and why.
Past trip
Describe a trip you took before.
Travel plans
Talk about a trip you want to take.
Travel story
Tell a complete travel story.

EN.vocab:

Learning methods

Learning difficulties
Talk about difficulties in learning.
Studying with others

Improving learning
Explain how you want to improve.
Learning reflection

EN.title: WORK TASKS & RESPONSIBILITIES
EN.vocab:
My main tasks

Daily responsibilities

Easy tasks

Difficult tasks
Describe tasks you find difficult.
Working with others
Talk about teamwork experiences.

Describe one full work/study day.

EN.title: COMMUNICATION PROBLEMS
EN.vocab:
Language problems
Talk about problems speaking or understanding.
Misunderstandings

Asking for repetition
Practice asking people to repeat or explain.
Clarifying meaning
Explain how you clarify information.
Solving communication issues
Talk about solutions.
Communication story
Tell a communication problem story.

EN.title: LIKES, DISLIKES & REASONS
EN.vocab:
Things I like in daily life
Talk about activities, food, places, or habits you like.
Things I dislike
Describe things you don’t enjoy in daily life.
Giving reasons
Explain why you like or dislike something (because, so).
Changing preferences
Talk about something you liked before but not now (or vice versa).
Comparing preferences
Compare two things you like or dislike (A vs B).
Personal taste summary
Summarize what your likes say about you.

EN.title: MAKING CHOICES
EN.vocab:
Daily small choices
Talk about choices you make every day (food, clothes, time).
Study/work choices
Describe choices related to study or work.
Choosing between two options
Explain how you choose A or B.
Simple pros & cons
Talk about good and bad points of a choice.
Satisfied or regretful choices
Describe a choice you feel good or bad about.
Decision story
Tell the story of one decision from start to result.

EN.title: TECHNOLOGY IN DAILY LIFE
EN.vocab:
Daily phone use
Describe how you use your phone every day.
Apps and tools
Talk about apps or tools you often use.
Benefits of technology
Explain how technology helps your life.
Problems with technology
Describe problems or stress caused by technology.
Technology habits
Talk about good or bad tech habits.
Technology reflection
Summarize how technology affects your life.

Entertainment habits

Watching alone or with others

EN.title: SHOPPING & SERVICES

Feeling tired or stressed

EN.title: PLANS & DECISIONS

Difficult moments

Mistakes and learning

People involved

EN.title: EXPLAINING IDEAS CLEARLY
EN.vocab:

Explaining a process

Giving examples

Clarifying meaning

EN.vocab:

EN.title: MY LIFE, MY VOICE (STAGE EXIT)
EN.vocab:
My past
Talk about where you started.
My present
Describe your current life.
My strengths
Talk about what you do well.
My challenges
Describe difficulties you face.
My future direction
Talk about where you are going.
Full life narrative
Tell your life story confidently.
🎯 Why this STAGE 2 design works for LISA
Strong continuity from Stage 1
Real-life relevance (work + student life)
Emotionally safe but cognitively richer
Perfect for role-play + AI prompts
Natural bridge into B1 speaking without pressure
🎯 STAGE 2 EXIT OUTCOME
✅ Stable A2+ → B1- speaking
✅ Can speak 90 minutes continuously
✅ Can explain, compare, give reasons

qa.q: 李老师的女儿叫什么名字？
你知道李老师的女儿喜欢什么吗？
你的电脑/汉语书/杯子在哪儿？

qa.a: 桌子上有一本书和一台电脑。

qa.q: 你什么时候看电影/看电视/看书？
你早上/中午/晚上几点吃饭？在哪儿吃？

qa.a: 我会做越南菜/中国菜/美国菜。

qa.q: 你几点起床/睡觉/吃早饭/午饭？
你爸爸/妈妈的生日是几月几号？
你为什么不开车来学校？

qa.a: 我每天上午八点开始工作。

qa.q: 你什么时候开始学习汉语？
qa.a: 我从二十岁的时候开始学习汉语。
因为我在中国公司工作。

qa.q: 请问你找李老师有什么事情吗？
qa.a: 我有一个问题想问李老师。

qa.q: 你有老师/李月的电话吗？
你觉得北京几月最漂亮？
qa.a: 我觉得北京九月最漂亮。

qa.q: 你生日的时候经常做什么？
你喜欢过生日吗？为什么？
朋友的生日，你送给他什么？
你的汉语老师是哪国人？
你们是从什么时候认识的？

qa.a: 喜欢运动/看电影/看电视/看书。

qa.q: 他/她经常帮助学生学汉语吗？
生病的时候我们要怎么做？
qa.a: 我们要在家休息，多喝水。

qa.q: 请问，你可以帮我买一杯咖啡/一本书吗？
别人帮你的时候，你怎么说？
你最喜欢/不喜欢什么颜色？
你有红色/粉色/黑色/白色的手表/手机/电脑吗？
红色的手表比黑色的手表贵吗？
qa.a: 红色的手表比黑色的手表贵一些。

qa.q: 这儿离学校/公司/商店远吗？
从你家到学校/公司/商店要多长时间？

qa.a: 我坐公交车去，因为有点远。

qa.q: 今天的汉字你写完了吗？
请问，学校/医院/宾馆在哪儿？
从这儿怎么去学校/商店？
你现在有什么学习计划？

JA.title: 最終ステージ（マスターフルエンシー）
JA.vocab:
これは練習ではなく「パフォーマンス」です。
構成：
過去
課題
変化
現在の能力
未来のビジョン
完全な人生ストーリー（20分連続）
🎯 最終到達成果（レベル100）
学習者は：
✔ 90分以上一貫して話せる
✔ 抽象的・倫理的・哲学的テーマを扱える
✔ ストーリー構造と感情表現を維持できる
✔ B2後半〜C1初期レベルで自信を持って話せる
✔ 英語を思考・生活言語として使える
